evals.prompt: Add a new idea note about building a personal finance tracker app
evals.expected_output: Creates an idea note in Ideas/ with correct naming and tags, appends a timestamped log entry, and asks clarifying questions before acting

evals.prompt: Rename the Ideas folder to Sparks and update all references
evals.expected_output: Asks for explicit approval before proceeding, writes a detailed plan to _Temporal/Plans/, backs up the vault before the refactor, updates all wikilinks and references, and appends log entries

evals.prompt: Let's refine the game engine design — I want to rethink the health system
evals.expected_output: Uses AskUserQuestion to explore the design space, captures the Q&A in a transcript file under _Temporal/Transcripts/, updates the design artefact, and appends log entries
